hero.name: Nguyen Van Kien
hero.tagline: Building, deploying, and scaling reliable systems
hero.summary: 3+ years building CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and automation on AWS, Kubernetes, and Docker. Focused on Configuration Management, SCM, Build/Release, and Infrastructure as Code.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: // who_am_i.sh
about.paragraph1: I'm a DevOps Engineer based in Hanoi, currently working at Sava Meta. My focus is on Configuration Management, SCM, Build/Release Management, and Infrastructure as Code.
about.paragraph2: I bridge the gap between application teams and infrastructure — having shipped production code myself, I understand what developers need from a platform: fast feedback loops, reliable CI, clear logs, and tooling that doesn't get in their way.
about.paragraph3: I've shipped CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and ArgoCD; built monitoring stacks with Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, and OpenTelemetry; and managed Kubernetes clusters on AWS for both internal AI platforms and Web3 trading systems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: // production_systems
projects.description: A selection of systems I've shipped — DevOps platforms, AI infra, Web3 trading, and full-stack web apps.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: // contact_info
contact.description: Open to DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineer roles. Drop me a line — I usually respond within 24 hours.
